creator: mopsfelder@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

I've just updated www/p5-Mojolicious to version 1.54.

Attached is the new patch.

Thanks.

On Mon, Jun 20, 2011 at 2:30 AM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of www/p5-Mojolicious,
>
> Please note that PR ports/158059 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/158059
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>



-- 
Murilo
